name: Rosemary Lyonnaise Potatoes
recipeIngredient: Sea Salt and freshly ground Black Pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
2. In a shallow dish, mix together the low-fat spread, rosemary, garlic, and onion.
3. Cook on HIGH for 3 minutes until soft.
4. Stir in the skim milk, sea salt, and freshly ground black pepper. Add the potato slices, arranging them neatly in the dish.
5. Cover and cook on MEDIUM for 12-15 minutes until the potatoes are tender. Optionally, brown under a broiler if desired.
6. Time: Preparation takes about 10 minutes, and cooking takes 12-15 minutes.
7. Variation: Other herbs can be substituted for rosemary. Chopped cooked ham can be added, serving as a light supper or lunch.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Recipe reformatted by Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master.
